name: Kiriacoulis Mediterranean Cruises Shipping SA
summary: Kiriacoulis Mediterranean Cruises Shipping SA, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the professional sea tourism, tourist ports management, and real estate businesses. It offers yacht chartering services, flotillas, bareboat chartering services, crew chartering services, etc. The company also sells new and second hand yachts, including sailboats, monohulls, catamarans, and motorboats, as well as provides parking spaces. It operates through a fleet of approximately 270 owned and managed yachts in Greece, Italy, Croatia, France, Malta, Spain, the Caribbean, and internationally. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
